MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Greg Anton, Esq. 789-8535 for Plaintiffs and moving for an order determining good faith settlemnt between Plaintiffs and defendant SCOTT MILLER; petitioning for compromise of minor EMILE CANNING's claim; and for deposit of funds for minor EMILE CANNING
Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF EMILE CANNING'S Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement (CCP 877.6): GRANTED; no opposition filed.
